phase_progress: Phase 9 executing: 7/10 changes DONE. C-007 (determinism) landed: structural finding — mcp_servers is a single ordered row + render_mcp_summary already sorts, so prompt output is byte-stable (existing kernel mcp_summary_* tests cover it, unchanged); added a config_store list() ORDER BY guard test. The core MCP config-store migration (storage + trait + overlay + writes + seed + reload + determinism) is COMPLETE and fully tested. Next C-005b (provider-default + config_set write paths + route-level HTTP TestServer) -> C-008 (prod config.toml import CLI + human verify) -> C-009 (K8s ConfigMap revert, hard-gated on C-008 prod verify).
